name: Quantum Hardware MCP Server
desc: Open-source MCP server connecting AI assistants like Claude to live IBM Quantum hardware. 7 tools for device status, error rates, and per-qubit rankings, plus an automated GitHub Actions pipeline collecting an open historical dataset. Listed on community registries (Glama, mcp.so).

name: Stripe MCP Server
desc: Open-source MCP server connecting Claude to a Stripe account via natural language. 7 tools: customers, revenue, invoices, failed payments, subscriptions, refunds, and disputes. Idempotency keys on write operations and a pinned API version prevent silent breakage on upstream changes.

name: Second Brain
tagline: Offline RAG System · Private by Design
desc: Fully offline retrieval-augmented generation system: local embeddings, vector search, and streaming LLM inference via Ollama — private by design. Wrote the eval harness first, tracking retrieval and generation quality as independent failure modes. Achieved 10/10 top-1 retrieval accuracy on the test set.

name: Multi-Property Booking Platform
desc: Custom booking platform built for a real client — multi-property motel chain. Scoped requirements directly with the client, handled cross-property availability logic, third-party reservation system integration (ASI WebRes), and deployed the full product independently.

name: Flowboxz
desc: Built a third-party logistics operation from scratch — helping Indian and international brands enter the US market with 1-day domestic delivery. Designed the pricing model, ran outreach across 15+ brands, guided clients through FDA registration and freight forwarding.
